name: byte-mcp-server
description: Per-byte USDC data feeds for AI agents on Arbitrum. First-party publishers, no API keys, EIP-712-attested payloads.
long_description: An MCP server for BYTE Library — a per-byte USDC data marketplace on Arbitrum. AI agents can discover first-party publishers, subscribe to live feeds (weather, markets, threat-intel, earthquakes, fact-oracles), monitor subscription health, publish their own data, and buy single packets via the x402 pay-per-call gateway — all settled in USDC. Every settlement emits an EIP-712 PayloadAttestation for a cryptographic delivery receipt. The 8 read-only tools need no wallet; the 5 write tools and byte_buy_data (x402) require a private key.

private_key.title: Wallet Private Key
private_key.description: Ethereum private key for write operations (subscribe, publish, faucet). Leave blank for read-only mode.

rpc_url.title: Arbitrum RPC URL
rpc_url.description: Arbitrum Sepolia RPC endpoint. Uses a public default if blank.

indexer_url.title: Indexer API URL
indexer_url.description: Byte Protocol indexer API URL. Uses the hosted default if blank.
